defects.root_cause: The local pilot reconciled only the expected metrics supplied by the caller. An empty set or a single matching metric could produce RECONCILED and PILOT_RUN_COMPLETE.
defects.risk: Cost, tax, other expenses, marketplace income, net profit or profit per unit could remain unverified while the pilot claimed completion.
fix: Require exactly the seven mandatory finance metrics for a reconciled pilot.
Bind the expected metric set to the declared control_totals_sha256 using canonical JSON and SHA-256.
Keep matching metrics without a declared hash in PENDING state.
Return CONFLICT on missing, unsupported, non-VALID or mismatched metrics.

defects.category: Independent financial oracle / tax policy divergence
defects.root_cause: The independent oracle calculated a negative tax when the selected tax base was negative, while the approved kernel correctly required an explicit negative-tax-base policy and returned BLOCKED.
defects.risk: The independent evidence path could endorse an unapproved negative tax and create a false kernel mismatch or an incorrect expected profit.
fix: Make the independent oracle fail closed when the selected tax base is negative.
Block tax, net profit and profit per sold unit until a negative-tax-base policy exists.
Add a permanent regression test for kernel/oracle agreement on this boundary.
